notes: This is metadata only (not consumed by training).
Each DR experiment JSON should be a single object mapping param_key -> {min,max}.
All ranges are uniform draws U[min,max]. For per-DOF/per-body parameters, the draw is elementwise.

geom_friction_fingertips.description: Sets fingertip sliding friction (MuJoCo geom_friction[...,0]) directly.

cube_inertia_scale.description: Scales cube body inertia (affects angular acceleration).

cube_ipos_add.description: Adds offset to cube COM position in body frame (meters).

hand_qpos0_add.description: Adds offset to hand default joint positions (radians).

hand_frictionloss_scale.description: Scales hand internal joint frictionloss (opposes motion; can kill small velocities).

hand_armature_scale.description: Scales hand armature (effective inertia in joint dynamics).

actuator_kp_scale.description: Scales actuator gain (position actuator strength) and keeps bias coupled to -kp.

hand_damping_scale.description: Scales hand joint damping (resistance proportional to joint velocity).
